display.purpose: Rare focus surfaces and important empty states.

headline.purpose: Section emphasis in focused views and overlays.

title.purpose: Sidebar sections, modal headings, and major form labels.

body.purpose: Readable interface text, form content, and messages.

label.purpose: Calendar labels, menu items, compact controls, and metadata.

shadows.name: floating-menu
shadows.purpose: Context menus and dropdowns above dense surfaces.

shadows.name: floating-form
shadows.purpose: Event forms and edit surfaces over calendar content.

motion.name: transition-quick
motion.purpose: Small interaction feedback for buttons and drag surfaces.

breakpoints.name: mobile-gate
breakpoints.value: current mobile view shows a gate instead of adapting the full calendar

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Decisive action button for isolated actions and gates.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 44px; cursor: pointer; border: none; border-radius: 4px; background: var(--color-accent-primary, #57c1ff); color: var(--color-text-dark, #0d1017); padding: 8px 32px; font-family: Rubik, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; transition: opacity 0.3s ease, background-color 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-accent-primary, #57c1ff); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Icon Button
components.description: Compact circular control for header and planning actions.
components.html: <button class="ds-icon-btn" aria-label="Next"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M9 6l6 6-6 6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-icon-btn { display: inline-flex; width: 34px; height: 34px; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; border: 2px solid transparent; border-radius: 999px; background: transparent; color: var(--color-text-light, #bfbdb5); padding: 0; transition: transform 0.2s ease-out, background-color 0.3s ease; } .ds-icon-btn svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; } .ds-icon-btn:hover { transform: scale(1.05); background: var(--color-border-primary, #47526633); } .ds-icon-btn:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-icon-btn:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-accent-primary, #57c1ff); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Transparent planning input that stays visually quiet until interaction.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: grid; gap: 6px; color: var(--color-text-light, #bfbdb5); font-family: Rubik, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input-label { font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-input { height: 34px; width: 100%; border: none; border-radius: 4px; outline: none; background: transparent; color: var(--color-text-lighter, #fff); padding: 0 8px; font-size: 1rem; transition: background-color 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-text-dark-placeholder, #6c727fe6); } .ds-input:hover { background: var(--color-border-primary, #47526633); } .ds-input:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-accent-primary, #57c1ff); }

components.name: Planner Panel
components.description: A compact planning surface for sidebar content, not a decorative card.
components.html:
Someday

Capture future work without cluttering the calendar.
components.css: .ds-panel { width: 285px; min-height: 180px; border-radius: 4px; background: var(--color-panel-bg, #6c727f33); color: var(--color-panel-text, #fafafa); padding: 16px; font-family: Rubik, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-panel h2 { margin: 0 0 12px; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-text-lighter, #fff); } .ds-panel p { margin: 0; color: var(--color-text-light-inactive, #abb6bf8c); font-size: 0.8125rem; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: View Select
components.description: Compact view navigation with a quiet dropdown and strong active state.
components.css: .ds-view-select { display: inline-grid; gap: 4px; font-family: Rubik, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-view-trigger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; background: transparent; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 0.8125rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.3s ease; } .ds-view-trigger svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; } .ds-view-trigger:hover, .ds-view-trigger:focus-visible { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); outline: none; } .ds-view-menu { min-width: 140px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border-primary, #47526633); border-radius: 4px; background: var(--color-bg-secondary, #11151c); padding: 4px 0; box-shadow: 0px 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.25); } .ds-view-option { display: flex; width: 100%; border: none; background: transparent; color: var(--color-text-light, #bfbdb5); padding: 8px 12px; text-align: left; font-size: 0.8125rem; cursor: pointer; } .ds-view-option:hover, .ds-view-option:focus-visible { background: var(--color-text-light-inactive, #abb6bf8c); outline: none; } .ds-view-option.ds-selected { background: var(--color-text-light, #bfbdb5); color: var(--color-text-dark, #0d1017); }

components.name: Event Block
components.description: Compact calendar item that preserves grid density and stays easy to scan.
components.css: .ds-event-block { display: flex; min-height: 32px; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 4px; background: var(--color-accent-primary, #57c1ff); color: var(--color-text-dark, #0d1017); padding: 4px 8px; font-family: Rubik, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background-color 0.35s linear, box-shadow 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-event-block strong { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-event-block span { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; font-size: 0.6875rem; opacity: 0.8; } .ds-event-block:hover { filter: brightness(1.08); } .ds-event-block:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-accent-primary, #57c1ff); }

narrative.overview:
Compass should feel like a precise instrument kept on a working desk: dark, quiet, responsive, and always ready. The interface is intentionally restrained because the user's attention belongs on the day, the week, and the next action, not on the product calling attention to itself.

The system is dense enough for real planning, but it should never feel cramped or corporate. Panels, calendar grids, command surfaces, and form controls should favor quick scanning, low motion, and stable placement. The visual language rejects bloated productivity suites, gamified habit apps, corporate SaaS dashboards, and slow calendar clones packed with secondary features.
keyCharacteristics: Dark, low-glare surfaces built for long planning sessions.
One clear blue accent used for action, focus, and current selection.
Compact type and small radii that keep the calendar feeling fast.
Flat surfaces with tonal layering before shadows.
Keyboard-first affordances with visible focus states.

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Instrument Blue is the only everyday accent. If a screen needs more than one attention color, the hierarchy is unclear.

rules.name: The Dark Surface Rule
rules.body: The calendar lives on Midnight Canvas. New surfaces should layer with Deep Panel or Smoke Panel, not introduce new background families.

rules.name: The Calendar Density Rule
rules.body: Use small type intentionally in grids, menus, and sidebar lists. Increase size only when the user is in a focus surface, not as a default polish move.

rules.name: The No Decorative Type Rule
rules.body: Do not add display fonts or novelty lettering to the product shell. Personal touches can exist in isolated moments, not in core planning controls.

rules.name: The Flat Until Floating Rule
rules.body: Resting surfaces are flat. A shadow means the surface is temporary, interactive, or above the calendar layer.

dos: Do keep new app surfaces grounded in Midnight Canvas, Deep Panel, and Smoke Panel.
Do use Instrument Blue for current selection, focus, and primary action.
Do preserve compact calendar density with stable dimensions and small type.
Do make keyboard focus visible on every actionable control.
Do use semantic Tailwind color tokens from `packages/web/src/index.css`.
Do treat local-first and no-account flows as first-class states.
donts: Don't make Compass feel like a bloated productivity suite.
Don't make Compass feel like a gamified habit app.
Don't make Compass feel like a corporate SaaS dashboard.
Don't make Compass feel like a slow calendar clone packed with secondary features.
Don't add marketing-heavy product surfaces inside the app.
Don't use decorative complexity, glassmorphism, generic card grids, hero metrics, or colored side-stripe borders.
Don't add gradient text. Existing legacy helpers should not become a new pattern.
Don't introduce raw colors for new styling when a semantic token exists.
